mapper.select: SELECT YEAR(create_time) AS year, MONTH(create_time) AS month, COUNT(CASE WHEN upload_result IN ('1', '3') THEN 1 END) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN upload_result = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS submit_number, SUM(CASE WHEN upload_result = '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pass_number FROM xml_file WHERE deleted = 0 AND create_time >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') GROUP BY YEAR(create_time), MONTH(create_time) ORDER BY year ASC, month ASC

SELECT YEAR(xf.create_time) AS year, MONTH(xf.create_time) AS month, COUNT(CASE WHEN upload_result IN (1, 2) THEN 1 END) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN xf.validate_result = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS validate_pass_count, SUM(CASE WHEN xf.validate_result = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS validate_fail_count FROM xml_file xf INNER JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(file_name, '_', 2), '_', -1) AS vin, MAX(id) AS max_id FROM xml_file WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(file_name, '_', 2), '_', -1) ) latest ON xf.id = latest.max_id WHERE xf.deleted = 0 AND xf.create_time >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') GROUP BY YEAR(xf.create_time), MONTH(xf.create_time) ORDER BY year ASC, month ASC;
